runners.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing third (28.98) at Sale. Gets the rails draw this time. Solid top-three prospects.

runners.formComment: Has been in the money the last two runs. Finished third at this track in 29.69 last time but the start prior clocked a fast 29.56 over 515m finishing second at this track. Looms as the one to beat this time.

runners.formComment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split last time, hitting the frame with a 1.3 lengths second (29.41) at this track and making it two placings on end. Although unsuccessful last time still ran one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with her.

runners.formComment: Finished in the minors last time but the start prior was an eye-catching winner scoring by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 5 H at this track and recording a decent 29.55 over the 515m journey. Has the ability and looks a key chance.

runners.formComment: Last start finished sixth in a Special conditions H on April 10 over 520m at Geelong behind Mav Reiko, beaten 6 lengths (30.41). Happy to risk in this.

runners.formComment: Out of the placings last time but the run prior she recorded a lightning 30.55 over 520m when just missed, at Bendigo. Can sneak a place again.

runners.formComment: Big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 0.8 lengths second (29.48) over 515m at this track. Found one better last time. Looks well placed and is worth following up.
